adoption_verdict.rationale: Valuable as a curated reference but not as a dependency. No license blocks redistribution. Content is decaying (link rot). Extract the curation taxonomy and link format, not the content itself.

candidates.name: 35-Category Tutorial Taxonomy
candidates.description: 35 technology categories organized for 'build from scratch' learning: 3D Renderer, AI Model, Blockchain, Database, Docker, Emulator, Git, Neural Network, OS, Programming Language, Regex Engine, Shell, Web Browser, Web Server, etc.
candidates.relevance_to_sonash: Could inform a 'learning path' feature or skill taxonomy. The categories map well to agent capabilities.

candidates.name: Curated Link Format Pattern
candidates.description: Consistent format: **Language**: _Title_ (link). Table of contents with anchor links. Simple, scannable, community-contributable.
candidates.relevance_to_sonash: Low — standard awesome-list format. Already well-known pattern.

candidates.name: Issue Template for Link Submissions
candidates.description: ISSUE_TEMPLATE.md structured for tutorial link submissions with category and language fields.
